title: Old Shape but Jappa
description: You love some of the old item shapes but love Jappa too? try this
body:
This Pack wants to give the old Shape to some of the new Jappa Items, at the moment there are only these items: - Apple
- Golden Apple
- Emerald
- Egg
- Chestplates
- Buckets
[SHOWCASE ON GALLERY](https://modrinth.com/project/old-shape-but-jappa/gallery) Probably in the future new Items will be added
